blocks.text: Period: Last 10 weeks (Google Play) · Reviews analyzed: 32
1. Theme cluster 0 — Users mention: The app freezes exactly when the market opens every single morning.
2. Theme cluster 2 — Users mention: Very easy to use interface for beginners starting their investment journey.
3. Theme cluster 1 — Users mention: Brokerage charges are too high compared to other discount brokers available.
